revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: <includeonly><!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- -->|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}} = {{Error|Two pages are needed to compare.}}<!-- -->|#default = <!-- -->{{Plain link<!-- -->|url = {{fullurl:Special:ComparePages|<!-- -->{{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{1|}}} + 1}}<!-- -->|page1={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}}<!-- -->|rev1={{{1}}}<!-- -->}}&<!-- -->{{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|}}} + 1}}<!-- -->|page2={{urlencode:{{{2}}}}}<!-- -->|rev2={{{2}}}<!-- -->}}}}<!-- -->|name = {{{label|{{{3|compare {{{label1|{{{1}}}}}} to {{{label2|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Compare_pages here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Compare_pages for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly><!-- -->{{#switch:<!-- -->|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}} = {{Error|Two pages are needed to compare.}}<!-- -->|#default = <!-- -->{{Plain link<!-- -->|url = {{fullurl:Special:ComparePages|<!-- -->{{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{1|}}} + 1}}<!-- -->|page1={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}}<!-- -->|rev1={{{1}}}<!-- -->}}&<!-- -->{{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|}}} + 1}}<!-- -->|page2={{urlencode:{{{2}}}}}<!-- -->|rev2={{{2}}}<!-- -->}}}}<!-- -->|name = {{{label|{{{3|compare {{{label1|{{{1}}}}}} to {{{label2|{{{2}}}}}}}}}}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
